productDisplayName: Vans Men E-Street Brown Casual Shoes
description: An irresistible leather and canvas shoe from vans – the smooth leather offers a perfect contrast to the rough and ready canvas and gives this shoe an extra helping of Wild West style. Not too casual and not too formal, wear this shoe with jeans. Uppers Leather and canvas uppers for durability and comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand tab on the side seam and brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
